description: The FirstPersonTargettingController component is used to control the head movement of a desktop user when they look around.

fields.MinVerticalAngle: The furthest down angle from 0 being forward the user can look in desktop.
fields.MaxVerticalAngle: The furthest up angle from 0 being forward the user can look in desktop.

usage: Not used directly by the user. Appears on a user root slot.
